mapper.select: SELECT u.id , u.name AS approverName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName , al.seq , al.approval_type AS type , al.status FROM approval_line al JOIN user u ON u.id = al.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY al.seq

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'DRAFT' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'REJECTED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'WAITING' AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'EXPECTED' AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'APPROVED' AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'REJECTED' AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type IN ('APPROVER','COOPERATOR') AND a.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'APPROVER' AND a.status = 'REJECTED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status = 'REJECTED' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'WAITING' AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'EXPECTED' AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS','APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'APPROVED' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.status = 'REJECTED' AND a.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND al.approval_type = 'COOPERATOR' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'REFERENCE' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS approvalId , a.code , a.title , a.status , a.created_at AS createdAt , a.is_requested AS isRequested , u.name AS drafterName , dept.name AS deptName , pos.name AS positionName FROM approval a JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_type = 'RECIPIENT' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_approval oa WHERE oa.approval_id = #{approvalId}) THEN 'ORDER' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM return_approval ra WHERE ra.approval_id = #{approvalId}) THEN 'RETURN' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM purchase_order_approval poa WHERE poa.approval_id = #{approvalId}) THEN 'PURCHASE_ORDER' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS category

SELECT o.id AS orderId , po.id AS historyId , p.code , p.name AS productName , p.spec , p.purchase_unit AS purchaseUnit , po.quantity , p.sale_price AS salePrice , (p.sale_price * po.quantity) AS amount FROM order_approval oa JOIN orders o ON oa.orders_id = o.id JOIN product_order po ON po.order_id = o.id JOIN product p ON p.id = po.product_id WHERE oa.approval_id = #{id}

SELECT a.id , a.code , a.title , a.remarks , 'ORDER' AS categoryType , pos.name AS positionName , u.sign_url AS url , dept.name AS deptName , dept.name AS deptName , a.status , a.created_at , a.processed_at As processedAt , u.name AS drafter_name , l.user_name , l.approval_type AS user_type FROM approval a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT al.approval_id, al.approval_type, u.name AS user_name FROM approval_line al JOIN user u ON al.user_id = u.id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_id = #{approvalId} ) l ON a.id = l.approval_id WHERE a.id = #{approvalId}

SELECT r.id AS returnId , rd.id AS historyId , p.code , p.name AS productName , p.spec , p.purchase_unit AS purchaseUnit , rd.quantity , p.sale_price AS salePrice , (p.sale_price * rd.quantity) AS amount FROM return_approval ra JOIN `return` r ON ra.return_id = r.id JOIN return_detail rd ON rd.return_id = r.id JOIN product p ON p.id = rd.product_id WHERE ra.approval_id = #{id}

SELECT a.id , a.code , a.title , a.remarks , 'RETURN' AS categoryType , pos.name AS positionName , u.sign_url AS url , dept.name AS deptName , a.processed_at As processedAt , a.status , a.created_at , u.name AS drafter_name , l.user_name , l.approval_type AS user_type FROM approval a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT al.approval_id , al.approval_type , u.name AS user_name FROM approval_line al JOIN user u ON al.user_id = u.id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_id = #{approvalId} ) l ON a.id = l.approval_id WHERE a.id = #{approvalId}

SELECT a.id , a.code , a.title , a.remarks , 'PURCHASE_ORDER' AS categoryType , pos.name AS positionName , u.sign_url AS url , dept.name AS deptName , a.status , a.processed_at As processedAt , a.created_at , u.name AS drafter_name , l.user_name , l.approval_type AS user_type FROM approval a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT al.approval_id , al.approval_type , u.name AS user_name FROM approval_line al JOIN user u ON al.user_id = u.id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} AND al.approval_id = #{approvalId} ) l ON a.id = l.approval_id WHERE a.id = #{approvalId}
SELECT id AS fileId , name AS fileName , url FROM approval_file WHERE approval_id = #{id}

SELECT po.id AS purchaseOrderId , pop.id AS historyId , p.code , p.name AS productName , p.spec , p.purchase_unit AS purchaseUnit , pop.quantity , p.purchase_price AS purchasePrice , (p.purchase_price * pop.quantity) AS amount FROM purchase_order_approval poa JOIN purchase_order po ON po.id = poa.purchase_order_id JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id JOIN product p ON pop.product_id = p.id WHERE poa.approval_id = #{id}
SELECT a.id , u.name , u.sign_url AS url FROM approval a JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{approvalId}

SELECT al.id AS approvalLineId , u.id AS id , u.name AS userName , al.approval_type AS type , dept.name AS departmentName , pos.name AS positionName , al.seq , al.status , al.processed_at AS processedAt , al.is_checked AS isChecked , al.checked_at AS checkedAt , al.opinion , u.sign_url AS url FROM approval_line al LEFT JOIN user u ON al.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id LEFT JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id LEFT JOIN approval a ON a.id = al.approval_id WHERE al.approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY al.seq
SELECT code FROM approval WHERE code LIKE CONCAT(#{codePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY code DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT alt.id , alt.name , alt.description , alt.seq FROM approval_line_template alt JOIN user u ON u.id = alt.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} ORDER BY alt.seq DESC

SELECT alt.id AS templateId , u.id AS userId , u.name AS userName , altd.type , dept.name AS departmentName , pos.name AS positionName , altd.seq FROM approval_line_template_detail altd JOIN approval_line_template alt ON alt.id = altd.approval_line_template_id JOIN user u ON u.id = altd.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hsd ON hsd.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hsd.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hsd.position_id WHERE alt.user_id = #{userId} AND alt.id = #{templateId} ORDER BY altd.seq

SELECT a.id , a.title , u.name , dept.name AS departmentName , pos.name AS positionName , a.created_at FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user Approver ON Approver.id = al.user_id WHERE Approver.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY a.created_at

SELECT a.id , a.title , u.name , dept.name AS departmentName , pos.name AS positionName , a.created_at FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user Approver ON Approver.id = al.user_id WHERE Approver.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY a.created_at

SELECT a.id , a.title , u.name , dept.name AS departmentName , pos.name AS positionName , a.created_at FROM approval a JOIN user u ON u.id = a.user_id JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON hud.user_id = u.id JOIN department dept ON dept.id = hud.department_id JOIN position pos ON pos.id = hud.position_id JOIN approval_line al ON al.approval_id = a.id JOIN user Approver ON Approver.id = al.user_id WHERE Approver.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'REJECTED' ORDER BY a.created_at
SELECT a.id AS approvalId, a.code, a.title, a.remarks a.status, a.is_requested AS isRequested, a.user_id AS id FROM approval a WHERE a.id = #{approvalId} AND a.status = 'DRAFT'

SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS approverName, d.name AS deptName, p.name AS positionName, l.seq, l.approval_type AS type FROM approval_line l JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hq_user_detail hud ON u.id = hud.user_id LEFT JOIN department d ON hud.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON hud.position_id = p.id WHERE l.approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY l.seq ASC
SELECT f.id AS fileId, f.name AS fileName, f.url FROM approval_file f WHERE f.approval_id = #{approvalId}
SELECT oa.orders_id FROM order_approval oa WHERE oa.approval_id = #{approvalId}
SELECT ra.return_id FROM return_approval ra WHERE ra.approval_id = #{approvalId}
SELECT poa.purchase_order_id FROM purchase_order_approval poa WHERE poa.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.sale_price * po.quantity), 0) FROM order_approval oa JOIN orders o ON oa.orders_id = o.id JOIN product_order po ON po.order_id = o.id JOIN product p ON p.id = po.product_id WHERE oa.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.sale_price * rd.quantity), 0) FROM return_approval ra JOIN `return` r ON ra.return_id = r.id JOIN return_detail rd ON rd.return_id = r.id JOIN product p ON p.id = rd.product_id WHERE ra.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.purchase_price * pop.quantity), 0) FROM purchase_order_approval poa JOIN purchase_order po ON po.id = poa.purchase_order_id JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id JOIN product p ON p.id = pop.product_id WHERE poa.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT o.id AS documentId, o.code AS documentNo, f.name AS franchiseName, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.total_amount AS amount FROM order_approval oa JOIN `orders` o ON oa.orders_id = o.id LEFT JOIN franchise f ON o.franchise_id = f.id WHERE oa.approval_id = #{approvalId}

SELECT r.id AS documentId, r.code AS documentNo, f.name AS franchiseName, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.description AS reason, r.total_amount AS amount FROM return_approval ra JOIN `return` r ON ra.return_id = r.id LEFT JOIN franchise f ON r.franchise_id = f.id

SELECT po.id AS documentId, po.code AS documentNo, s.name AS supplierName, po.created_at AS createdAt, po.total_amount AS amount FROM purchase_order_approval poa JOIN purchase_order po ON poa.purchase_order_id = po.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id WHERE poa.approval_id = #{approvalId}
